positive: A minimalist celestial scene featuring a large, stylized crescent moon and a cluster of deep-blue nebulae surrounded by abstract, glowing gold and silver cosmic dust trails. The composition is balanced and symmetrical, designed for central placement on fabric. Use strong contrast with dark midnight navy blues and purples. The overall style should be ethereal, abstract geometric art, resembling high-end tapestry design or stained glass backlit by starlight. Intricate linework, clean silhouettes, highly defined edges, perfect symmetry, designed for direct textile printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, graffiti, messy, grunge, realistic photography, people, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, jpeg artifacts
